description: Pinned corpus: the Swiss Federal Act on Product Safety (Produktesicherheitsgesetz, PrSG / SR 930.11; French: Loi sur la sécurité des produits, LSPro), consolidated version in force 2023-09-01, fetched from the Fedlex filestore (official federal law portal). One law, multiple official language versions. The date pins the consolidation; a newer consolidation changes the checksum and the corpus version is bumped deliberately.
law: SR 930.11 — Bundesgesetz über die Produktesicherheit (Produktesicherheitsgesetz, PrSG)
